final_sql:
WITH classified_sessions AS (
SELECT
  t1.*,
  h.value:"productRevenue" AS productRevenue,
  t.value:"transactions" AS transactions
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."totals":hits) t
WHERE t.value:"transactions" >= 1 AND h.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL
),
purchase_group AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime") AS month,
  CASE WHEN transactions IS NOT NULL AND productRevenue IS NOT NULL THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non-purchase' END AS purchase_classification,
  AVG(t2.value:"pageviews") AS avg_pageviews,
  COUNT(t1."fullVisitorId") AS visitor_count
FROM classified_sessions AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."totals":pageviews) t2
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t1."visitStartTime"), purchase_classification
)
SELECT
  month,
  purchase_classification,
  AVG(avg_pageviews) AS avg_pageviews,
  SUM(visitor_count) AS visitor_count
FROM purchase_group
WHERE "visitStartTime" >= 20170401 AND "visitStartTime" <= 20170731
GROUP BY month, purchase_classification
ORDER BY month ASC
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=cte_first) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH youtube_visitors AS (
  SELECT
    t1.*
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
),
product_quantities AS (
  SELECT
    h.value:"page":"pagePath" AS product,
    SUM(h.value:"productRevenue") AS total_quantity
  FROM youtube_visitors AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%'
  GROUP BY h.value:"page":"pagePath"
),
top_product AS (
  SELECT product, total_quantity
  FROM product_quantities
  ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT *
FROM top_product;
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=cte_first) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH monthly_conversion_rates AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(t."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
  COUNT(h.value:"page":"pagePath") AS pageviews,
  SUM(h.value:"productRevenue") AS total_revenue
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170630 AS t,
LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."hits") h
WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath" ILIKE '%product-details%'
AND DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(t."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN '2017-01-01' AND '2017-03-31'
GROUP BY month
)
SELECT
  month,
  pageviews,
  total_revenue,
  (total_revenue / NULLIF(pageviews, 0)) * 100 AS conversion_rate
FROM monthly_conversion_rates;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH inventor_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(t1."publication_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS publication_year,
    COUNT(i.value:"field") AS inventor_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."inventor") i
  WHERE t1."country_code" = 'CA' 
    AND i.value:"field" IS NOT NULL 
    AND t1."publication_date" >= 19600000 
    AND t1."publication_date" <= 20201231
  GROUP BY publication_year
),
publication_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TRY_TO_DATE(t1."publication_date"::STRING, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS publication_year,
    COUNT(t1."publication_number") AS publication_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  WHERE t1."country_code" = 'CA' 
    AND t1."publication_date" >= 19600000 
    AND t1."publication_date" <= 20201231
  GROUP BY publication_year
)
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('FIVE_YEAR', inventor_counts.publication_year) AS period,
  AVG(inventor_counts.inventor_count) AS avg_number_of_inventors,
  SUM(publication_counts.publication_count) AS total_patent_publications
FROM inventor_counts
JOIN publication_counts ON inventor_counts.publication_year = publication_counts.publication_year
GROUP BY period
ORDER BY period ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=cte_first) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH assignee_counts AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(t1."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "year",
    a.value:"field"::STRING AS "assignee",
    COUNT(t1."application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."assignee") a
  WHERE t1."application_kind" = 'A61'
  GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(t1."filing_date"), 'YYYYMMDD')), a.value:"field"::STRING
),
max_assignee AS (
  SELECT
    "year",
    "assignee",
    "application_count",
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "year" ORDER BY "application_count" DESC) AS rank
  FROM assignee_counts
)
SELECT
  "year",
  "assignee",
  "application_count"
FROM max_assignee
WHERE rank = 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed
